name: Aplix Corporation
summary: Aplix Corporation engages in the technology business. It develops package software for the NeXT computer system; CD/DVD authoring software; automotive telematics systems; java for consumer electronics; and JBlend software on mobile phones. The company also develops and markets Internet of Things products from hardware and software to cloud service; and develops wireless communication technologies that connect consumer electronic products to mobile devices. In addition, it offers communication modules, Wi-Fi solutions, BLE/Wi-Fi gateways, and embedded water flow sensors. The company was formerly known as Aplix IP Holdings Corporation and changed its name to Aplix Corporation in April 2017. Aplix Corporation was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
